PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Cohen for Paula Johnson (Petitioner). John Weinstein for and with Osvel Laurent, Jr. (Beneficiary). Phillip Keith for the "Aldaz Creditors".

The Court noted that Jacqueline Laurent was not present. Counsel received confirmation from the Probate Examiner that the Creditor's Claim amounts for Church Mutual and Mr. Laurent Jr. were inadvertently not included in the figures provided. Mr. Cohen submitted a revised Order for Withdrawal of Funds from Blocked Account. The Court granted the Petition for Final Distribution (subject to review of the order). The Court also noted that the filing fee for Ms. Laurent's Petition was not paid. Ms. Laurent's Petition for Letters of Administration was taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Loos.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1881 Oakdale Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94127)
Off Calendar Oct-23-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Cohen for and with Paula Johnson (Administrator). John Weinstein for Osvel Paul Laurent, Jr. (Heir).

Mr. Cohen provided an endorsed copy of the Proof of Service. The sale was confirmed at $145,000.00 to Thomas Lau (Real Estate Agent) on behalf of Ruo Neng Chen subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the petition (subject to receipt and review of the order). The proceeds from the sale are to be deposited into a blocked account. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was set for November 6, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1881 Oakdale Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94127)
Off Calendar Sep-11-2012 Continued To Oct-16-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Cohen for and with Paula Johnson. John Weinstein for Osvel Laurent, Jr. (Heir).

The Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property was continued to October 16, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a Proof of Service to all Parties and for publication.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing Of Blocked Account Receipt
Off Calendar Apr-30-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Cohen for Paula Johnson (Administrator). John Weinstein for Osvel Laurent, Jr. Raymond Alexander and Albert Boasberg for and with Rong Niu (Propsective Purchaser).

The Court ruled that the Estate holds title of the property. Mr. Alexander is to prepare the order. Status on the receipt for the blocked account is off calendar.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Apr-30-2012 Text Ruling

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Apr-02-2012 Continued To Apr-30-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ray Alexander and Albert Boasberg for Rong Niu (Buyer). Garry Cohen for Paula Johnson (Administrator). John Weinstein for Osvel Laurent, Jr. Jaqueline Laurent is also present.

Property was sold and subsequently burned down. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to completion of the sale/recording of the deed. The matter was continued to April 30, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The Court expects the parties to meet and confer on the issues prior to the next court date.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1881 Oakdale Ave. S.F.)
Off Calendar Feb-09-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Cohen for Administrator. John Weinstein for Osvel Paul Laurent, Jr. (Beneficiary).

The original bidder and her agent were in Court and they waived notice. The bid was increased and the sale was confirmed at $205,000.00 to the Rong Niu, (the original bidder) based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). The sale proceeds are to be place into a blocked account. Status for filing of blocked account receipt was continued to February 27, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1881 Oakdale Ave. S.F.)
Off Calendar Nov-21-2011 Continued To Feb-06-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Cohen for and with Paula Johnson (Petitioner). Other Family Members were also present.

The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property was continued to February 6, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for notice to be given to all Parties including Mr. Smith (Bond Company). The Court directed all Parties to provide Mr. Cohen their names and addresses in open Court.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
